================================================================================
🎬 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - DEPLOYMENT SUMMARY
================================================================================

STATUS: Complete ✅

Created: 2026-04-16 05:30 UTC
Job ID: 114e5c6d-ac8b-47ca-a695-79ac31b5c076
Channel: Concessa Obvius (requires Channel ID)
Schedule: Every 30 minutes (cron job)

================================================================================
WHAT'S BEEN CREATED
================================================================================

Core Components:
  ✅ youtube-monitor.py          (Main monitoring script)
  ✅ youtube-monitor-utils.sh    (Utilities: view logs, stats, search)
  ✅ install-cron.sh             (One-command cron installer)
  ✅ requirements.txt            (Python dependencies)

Documentation:
  ✅ README-YOUTUBE-MONITOR.md   (Quick reference)
  ✅ YOUTUBE-SETUP.md            (Installation guide)
  ✅ YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md       (Detailed operations)

Output Files (auto-created on first run):
  → .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl      (All comments with metadata)
  → .cache/youtube-monitor-state.json  (Tracking state)
  → .cache/youtube-monitor.log         (Execution logs)

================================================================================
QUICK START (3 STEPS)
================================================================================

1️⃣  INSTALL DEPENDENCIES
   $ pip install -r .cache/requirements.txt

2️⃣  SETUP CREDENTIALS (automated)
   $ bash .cache/install-cron.sh
   
   This will:
   - Prompt for YouTube API Key
   - Prompt for Concessa Obvius Channel ID
   - Create ~/.config/openclaw/youtube-monitor.env
   - Install cron job (every 30 minutes)
   - Confirm installation

3️⃣  CHECK IT'S WORKING
   $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh status

   You should see: "Monitor Status and Stats"

================================================================================
WHAT YOU NEED (Before Installation)
================================================================================

1. YOUTUBE API KEY
   Get from: https://console.cloud.google.com
   - Create/select a project
   - Enable YouTube Data API v3
   - Create API Key credential
   - Copy the key

2. CONCESSA OBVIUS CHANNEL ID
   Method 1: Visit channel → View page source → search "channelId"
   Method 2: YouTube Data API will tell you if you have access
   Format: UC followed by 22 characters (e.g., UCxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx)

================================================================================
HOW IT WORKS
================================================================================

Every 30 minutes, the script:

1. Fetches latest comments from Concessa Obvius channel
2. Categorizes each comment:
   - QUESTIONS (how, cost, timeline, tools)    → Auto-response queued
   - PRAISE (amazing, inspiring, love)          → Auto-response queued
   - SPAM (crypto, nft, mlm)                    → Logged & ignored
   - SALES (partnership, collaboration)         → Flagged for review
   - OTHER (no match)                           → Logged only

3. Logs everything to .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl with:
   - Timestamp
   - Commenter name
   - Full comment text
   - Category
   - Response status
   - Engagement metrics

4. Generates report with statistics

================================================================================
MANAGING THE MONITOR
================================================================================

View Status:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh status

Review Flagged Items (Sales/Partnerships):
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh flagged

See Recent Comments:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh recent 20

Find Common Questions:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh category questions

Search Comments:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh search "pricing"

View Statistics:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh stats

Export to CSV:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh export csv

Help:
  $ bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh help

================================================================================
MANAGING THE CRON JOB
================================================================================

View crontab:
  $ crontab -l

Edit crontab:
  $ crontab -e

Uninstall cron:
  $ crontab -r

View cron logs (macOS):
  $ log stream --predicate 'process == "cron"'

Check execution:
  $ tail -f .cache/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================
FEATURES & BEHAVIOR
================================================================================

✅ IMPLEMENTED NOW:
   - YouTube API integration
   - Comment fetching & deduplication
   - Keyword-based categorization
   - Detailed logging (JSONL format)
   - Statistics tracking
   - Cron scheduling (every 30 min)
   - Full utility suite for querying logs

⏳ AUTO-RESPONSE SYSTEM:
   - Questions & Praise: Responses QUEUED (not yet sent to YouTube)
   - Status: "auto_response_queued" in logs
   - To enable actual YouTube replies: See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md

🚫 NOT INCLUDED:
   - OAuth/authenticated replies (requires service account setup)
   - Discord notifications (can add)
   - Email alerts (can add)
   - Advanced ML categorization (can add)
   - See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md for advanced enhancements

================================================================================
NEXT IMMEDIATE ACTIONS
================================================================================

Before Running:
  [ ] Get YouTube API Key from Google Cloud Console
  [ ] Find Concessa Obvius Channel ID
  [ ] Install Python dependencies: pip install -r .cache/requirements.txt

Setup:
  [ ] Run: bash .cache/install-cron.sh
  [ ] Enter API Key when prompted
  [ ] Enter Channel ID when prompted
  [ ] Confirm installation

Testing:
  [ ] Manual test: python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py
  [ ] Check status: bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh status
  [ ] View logs: tail .cache/youtube-monitor.log
  [ ] Review recent comments: bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh recent 10

Monitoring:
  [ ] Set up daily status check (optional, automated after cron install)
  [ ] Review flagged items weekly: bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh flagged
  [ ] Archive logs monthly

================================================================================
DOCUMENTATION REFERENCE
================================================================================

For Setup Instructions:
  → cat .cache/YOUTUBE-SETUP.md

For Daily Operations:
  → cat .cache/YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md

For Quick Reference:
  → cat .cache/README-YOUTUBE-MONITOR.md

For Help with Utilities:
  → bash .cache/youtube-monitor-utils.sh help

For Execution Issues:
  → tail .cache/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================
SUPPORT & TROUBLESHOOTING
================================================================================

Setup Issues:
  - Read YOUTUBE-SETUP.md
  - Verify API Key & Channel ID
  - Check network: curl https://www.youtube.com

Cron Not Running:
  - Check: crontab -l
  - Logs: log stream --predicate 'process == "cron"'
  - Manual: python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py

Script Errors:
  - Check: .cache/youtube-monitor.log
  - Full output: python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py 2>&1

API Issues:
  - Quota: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/dashboard
  - Docs: https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3
  - Rate limits: See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md

================================================================================
CONFIGURATION NOTES
================================================================================

Schedule: */30 * * * * (every 30 minutes)
  Change to: */15 * * * * (every 15 minutes)
  Or: */60 * * * * (every hour)
  Edit: crontab -e

API Quota Usage:
  Current: ~50 units per run × 48 runs/day = ~2,400 units/day
  Free Limit: 10,000 units/day
  Status: ✅ Well within limits

Comment Limits:
  Fetches: 5 recent videos × 100 comments each = up to 500 comments/run
  Avoids: Duplicate detection, so only new comments logged

Log Retention:
  Format: JSONL (one JSON object per line)
  Size: ~400 bytes per comment
  Annual: ~5.8 MB for ~15,000 comments

================================================================================
ADVANCED FEATURES (Optional)
================================================================================

Enable Auto-Responses to YouTube:
  1. Set up OAuth (Service Account in Google Cloud)
  2. Uncomment reply sending code in youtube-monitor.py
  3. See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md → Advanced Enhancements

Machine Learning Categorization:
  1. pip install transformers
  2. Replace keyword matching with transformer-based classifier
  3. See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md for code

Discord Notifications:
  1. Create webhook in your Discord server
  2. Add notify_discord() function in script
  3. See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md for implementation

Email Alerts:
  1. Configure SMTP
  2. Add email sending function
  3. See YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md for setup

================================================================================
IMPORTANT: BEFORE YOU START
================================================================================

1. GET API KEY:
   https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
   (You'll need a Google Cloud project - free to create)

2. FIND CHANNEL ID:
   Visit: https://www.youtube.com/c/[channel-name]/about
   View page source, search for "channelId"
   Format: UC followed by 22 characters

3. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES:
   pip install google-api-python-client

4. RUN INSTALLER:
   bash .cache/install-cron.sh

That's it! The installer handles the rest.

================================================================================
VERIFY INSTALLATION
================================================================================

After running install-cron.sh, check:

1. Environment file created:
   $ ls -la ~/.config/openclaw/youtube-monitor.env

2. Cron job installed:
   $ crontab -l | grep youtube

3. Manual test passes:
   $ cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace
   $ python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py

Expected output:
   [timestamp] Starting YouTube Comment Monitor
   [timestamp] Fetching comments...
   ============================================================
   YouTube Comment Monitor - Report
   ============================================================
   (report details)
   ============================================================

4. Check logs exist:
   $ ls -la .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
   $ ls -la .cache/youtube-monitor-state.json

If all above pass: ✅ Installation successful!

================================================================================
TIMELINE & EXPECTATIONS
================================================================================

Installation: 5-10 minutes total
  - Get API key: 2 minutes
  - Find Channel ID: 1 minute
  - Run install script: 2 minutes
  - Test: 1-2 minutes

First 30 minutes: System runs first check
  - Fetches current comments
  - Categorizes & logs
  - Creates output files

First day: System accumulates data
  - 48 runs in 24 hours
  - ~50-200 comments (depends on channel activity)
  - Ready for first review

First week: Patterns emerge
  - FAQ questions identifiable
  - Spam/spam patterns clear
  - Sales inquiry rate established
  - Good time to review trends

================================================================================
END OF DEPLOYMENT SUMMARY
================================================================================

Your YouTube Comment Monitor is ready to deploy.

Next step: Get API Key → Run install-cron.sh → Done! 🚀

For questions, see documentation files in .cache/ directory.

Questions? Check YOUTUBE-OPERATIONS.md for detailed help.
